"'''Order 66: Destroy All Jedi'''" is a reference article appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 87|''Star Wars Insider'' 87]], written by [[Daniel Wallace]]. It features information about [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who were killed during [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] and the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] via the document [[Casualty Report: Order 66]].<ref name="SWI 87" />

{{Magazine-stub|article}}
